External pull requests are not accepted yet.

Rayline Local is currently in a locked-down, pre-public-contribution phase.
Please open an issue instead if you are not on the maintainer team.

## Maintainer Checklist

- [ ] This PR is from a maintainer.
- [ ] CI and security checks pass.
- [ ] User-facing text uses Rayline Local terminology.
- [ ] No secrets, private service details, release credentials, or internal-only paths are included.
